text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The end of the year has come, and with it, the
Arima Kinen—the final determiner of the year's
best racer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet heads towards the fateful race,
vowing to seize the number one spot regardless
of whatever may come her way.
